query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, sr.code as role_code, sr.name as role_name 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.userId 
LEFT JOIN system_roles sr ON ur.roleId = sr.id 
ORDER BY u.id 
LIMIT 10;
command:

FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.userId
